title: campuloclinium hickenii
intro: Campuloclinium hickenii is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the feather-top or feather-top bush, native to South America. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Campuloclinium hickenii include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, to treat various ailments, and it is also used in folk medicine to promote skin health and reduce fever.
